ceo_oversight.name: David Hauer
ceo_oversight.role: Final oversight only — all operational decisions delegated to AI Agent Fleet
ceo_oversight.escalation_threshold: Critical risk events, capital deployments exceeding $500K, legal exposure

governance_principles.name: Autonomous Execution with Accountability
governance_principles.description: All 40 agents operate autonomously within defined guardrails. Every action is logged, auditable, and traceable to the originating agent and governance rule.

governance_principles.name: Capital Growth Mandate
governance_principles.description: Every agent action must demonstrably contribute to regional and international capital growth. Idle cycles are redirected to revenue-generating activities.

governance_principles.name: Industrial-Grade Reliability
governance_principles.description: All systems maintain 99.9% uptime. Failover, redundancy, and self-healing are mandatory for all production agents.

governance_principles.name: Luxury-Grade Quality Standards
governance_principles.description: All client-facing outputs meet luxury market standards. No draft-quality content reaches external stakeholders.

governance_principles.name: Risk Mitigation as Core Function
governance_principles.description: Risk assessment is embedded in every workflow. Agents cannot execute high-impact actions without risk scoring.

governance_principles.name: 5-Year Goals in 6-Month Execution
governance_principles.description: Compression ratio of 10:1 on traditional timelines. Agents operate at machine speed, not human speed.

governance_principles.name: Inter-Agent Cooperation Protocol
governance_principles.description: Agents communicate through the message bus. No agent operates in isolation. Cross-division coordination is mandatory for multi-step workflows.

governance_principles.name: Continuous Self-Improvement
governance_principles.description: Agents analyze their own performance metrics weekly and propose optimization plans to the Master Orchestrator.

levels.name: High
levels.description: Operations with significant financial or reputational impact

levels.name: Critical
levels.description: Operations requiring CEO oversight per governance charter

operational: Data encryption at rest and in transit
